texto: Everyone is given one gift, a reason for being, and it's our obligation to do something with it. Obviously, it's a challenge - but if you're not taking the bull by the horns, I have no patience for you. You're just taking up space.
explicacao: Citação de Melissa Rosenberg sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Everyone is given one gift, a reason for being, and it's our obligation to do something with it. …” articula reflexao, challenge, space em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como space e gift.

frase_original: Everyone is given one gift, a reason for being, and it's our obligation to do something with it. Obviously, it's a challenge - but if you're not taking the bull by the horns, I have no patience for you. You're just taking up space.

texto: I love Charlie, Billy Burke's character. Writing for him is so spectacular, he's so funny and wry and every scene he's in he just takes. There's a scene in 'Eclipse' where Bella tells him she's a virgin, and it's the funniest, most awkward scene I've ever seen on film.
explicacao: Citação de Melissa Rosenberg sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “I love Charlie, Billy Burke's character. Writing for him is so spectacular, he's so funny and wry…” articula humor, love, character em registro de humor, com relevância para contextos como character e writing.

frase_original: I love Charlie, Billy Burke's character. Writing for him is so spectacular, he's so funny and wry and every scene he's in he just takes. There's a scene in 'Eclipse' where Bella tells him she's a virgin, and it's the funniest, most awkward scene I've ever seen on film.

texto: My humor tends to be a little more edgy than is appropriate for 'Twilight,' although I got some in there. That was fun! There's just a tonal difference. For me, storytelling is storytelling. But, I do like writing for grown ups.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Melissa Rosenberg: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a humor. O trecho “My humor tends to be a little more edgy than is appropriate for 'Twilight,' although I got some i…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que humor, writing, fun pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e fun.

frase_original: My humor tends to be a little more edgy than is appropriate for 'Twilight,' although I got some in there. That was fun! There's just a tonal difference. For me, storytelling is storytelling. But, I do like writing for grown ups.
